name: @freshifyv2/portal-shell-ui
description: Sovereign Portal shell — Chrome, sidebar, topbar, footer, and shared CSS. Consumed by portal-shell, users-fe, companies-fe, workspaces-fe.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && tsc -p tsconfig.types.json && cp src/globals.css dist/globals.css
